name: Phu Quoc Golf & Seaside Relaxation 4 days
highlights: Impressive golf experience at world-standard Vinpearl Phu Quoc Golf Resort
Enjoy a relaxing stay at Vinpearl Phu Quoc Gold amidst the green scenery
Discover vibrant nightlife with local activities and entertainment options
Best for golf lovers looking for a serene and unforgettable getaway in Phu Quoc

itinerary.title: Phu Quoc Arrival
itinerary.description: Upon arrival at Phu Quoc International Airport, our driver will greet you and transfer you to your hotel. After checking in, take some time to relax and explore modern facilities as well as beautiful surroundings on your own. In the evening, you are good to get your first impression of what nightlife is like in Phu Quoc. One of the best ways to visit is to stroll along Dinh Cau Night Market, where you can taste fresh seafood and local specialties or chill out at a beachside bar while watching the sunset. For a more relaxing experience, why not visit a spa for a traditional Vietnamese massage? ...

itinerary.title: Transfer to Vinpearl Phu Quoc Golf (18 holes - 2 rounds)
itinerary.description: After breakfast, you will be taken to Vinpearl Phu Quoc Golf. Surrounded by rolling hills and mountains, this 18-hole championship course offers a blend of challenge and relaxation for golf lovers of all skill levels. Designed to international standards, the course provides a memorable golfing experience with well-maintained fairways, strategic bunkers, and panoramic sea views. Once in here, you will enjoy a full round of golf, immersing yourself in the fresh island air and the serene atmosphere. After that, it is time to settle into Vinpearl Phu Quoc Golf Resort and spend the night there.

itinerary.title: Second day at Vinpearl Phu Quoc Golf (18 holes - 2 rounds)
itinerary.description: The following day, you wake up to the fresh morning air of Phu Quoc and be ready for another exciting round of golf at Vinpearl Phu Quoc Golf. Refine your skills as you take on fairways and greens. After finishing your rounds, you take some time to loosen up at the clubhouse or explore the resort’s other services. Enjoy Phu Quoc on your own before heading back to your room for a rest.

itinerary.title: Phu Quoc Departure
itinerary.description: On the last day, you will start with a breakfast at the hotel. Afterward, you will have some free time to relax or walk around if you want. Once you are ready, our guide will transfer you to the Phu Quoc International Airport for your return flight home. We hope you had an amazing golfing experience in this tropical paradise and look forward to welcoming you back for your next adventure!

included: Golf rate applied for 01 golfer play 18 holes include: Green fee, caddie fee & ½ buggy fee
Overnight in shared Twin/ Double  room with Air-condition (AC) at hotel.
All transport during the tour on air-conditioned vehicle as per itinerary (including airport pick up & see off)
Meals as indicated in the program
importantNotes: PROGRAMS & SCHEDULES SUBJECT TO CHANGE WITHOUT PRIOR NOTICE
